mailbox.force_refresh_desc: This option forces an update of the mailbox list from the provider. By default, it is updated every day or after each action of the mailbox list (Create, Edit, Delete mailbox).
mailbox.force_retrieve_title: Force retrieve the mailbox list from the email provider.
